# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: VPC with public and private subnets across multiple AZs for microservices architecture, including IGW, NAT Gateways, and route tables. VPC Flow Logs intentionally omitted.

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  PublicSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/24
    Description: CIDR for public subnet in AZ1
  PublicSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR for public subnet in AZ2
  PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.10.0/24
    Description: CIDR for private application subnet in AZ1
  PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.11.0/24
    Description: CIDR for private application subnet in AZ2
  PrivateDataSubnet1Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.20.0/24
    Description: CIDR for private data subnet in AZ1
  PrivateDataSubnet2Cidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.21.0/24
    Description: CIDR for private data subnet in AZ2

Mappings: {}

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: microservices-vpc

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: microservices-igw

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: public-subnet-az1
        - Key: Tier
          Value: public

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: public-subnet-az2
        - Key: Tier
          Value: public

  PrivateAppSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: private-app-subnet-az1
        - Key: Tier
          Value: private-app

  PrivateAppSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: private-app-subnet-az2
        - Key: Tier
          Value: private-app

  PrivateDataSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: private-data-subnet-az1
        - Key: Tier
          Value: private-data

  PrivateDataSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2Cidr
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: private-data-subnet-az2
        - Key: Tier
          Value: private-data

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: public-rt

  PublicDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NatEip1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: nat-eip-az1

  NatEip2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: nat-eip-az2

  NatGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEip1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: nat-gateway-az1

  NatGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEip2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: nat-gateway-az2

  PrivateRouteTableAz1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: private-rt-az1

  PrivateRouteTableAz2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: private-rt-az2

  PrivateRouteAz1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  PrivateRouteAz2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

  PrivateAppSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz1

  PrivateDataSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz1

  PrivateAppSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz2

  PrivateDataSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableAz2

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'

  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1Id'

  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2Id'

  PrivateAppSubnet1Id:
    Description: Private app subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateAppSubnet1Id'

  PrivateAppSubnet2Id:
    Description: Private app subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateAppSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateAppSubnet2Id'

  PrivateDataSubnet1Id:
    Description: Private data subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateDataSubnet1Id'

  PrivateDataSubnet2Id:
    Description: Private data subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateDataSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateDataSubnet2Id'

  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: Internet Gateway ID
    Value: !Ref InternetGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InternetGatewayId'

  NatGateway1Id:
    Description: NAT Gateway in AZ1
    Value: !Ref NatGateway1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatGateway1Id'

  NatGateway2Id:
    Description: NAT Gateway in AZ2
    Value: !Ref NatGateway2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NatGateway2Id'
